title: Will the **high temp in LA** be >90° on Mar 19, 2026?
rules_primary: If the highest temperature recorded in Los Angeles Airport, CA for March 19, 2026 as reported by the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), is greater than 90°, then the market resolves to Yes.
